message: No concurrency test despite file_status module being designed around fcntl locks. The module docstring emphasizes 'fcntl-locked read-modify-write' but no test exercises concurrent update/remove from multiple processes to verify locking actually prevents lost writes.
rationale: Concurrency test for fcntl locks would be slow/clunky and the implementation is straightforward fcntl.flock usage, deemed low-risk. Revisit if we ever observe sync issues in practice.
